title: Security Teams Deserve AI-Native Security: AI Agents for Vulnerability Management
description: Maze is the AI-native cloud vulnerability management platform for teams that ship fast and don't have time to chase false positives. Our AI agents investigate, triage, and remediate every vulnerability in your cloud, proving what's actually exploitable. 70 to 90% of vulnerabilities can't be exploited in your specific environment.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: Security Teams Deserve AI-Native Security: AI Agents for Vulnerability Management
